title: Demo & Test data working group
content:
Demo & Test data working group

#wg_demo-test-data (only accessible from within the company)

Issue List / Issue Board

The efficiency of both demo and test data is key to moving our business faster. We have fragmented locations where these data resides and are provisioned. There is also a knowledge gap between what is used in technical sales and what is used in test and validation.

We will benefit from tooling efficiency together and broaden visiblity of demo data in the field and test data in Engineering.

Exit Criteria (100% completed)

Identify differences and gaps between demo and test data

Provide ability to seed demo data on-demand

Delivery of first iteration of working demo data usable by SAs in the field

Define “beautiful test data” for SAs to use in the field

Deliver MVP based on the defined set of “beautiful test data”

Delivery of second iteration of working demo data more easily usable by SAs in the field

Rename AwesomeCo to GitLab Data Seeder

Publish GitLab Data Seeder Handbook Page

Roles and Responsibilities

Staff Software Engineer in Test

Senior Manager, Solutions Architects

Senior Manager, Quality Engineering

Staff Software Engineer in Test

Principal, Strategy and Operations (Technical)

Senior Director of Engineering

Senior Product Manager

Staff Federal Solution Architect

Staff Solutions Architect

Senior Solutions Architect

The GitLab Data Seeder was created as a result of this working group.

An internal Slack channel was created.

A video showing demo data was created.

Future iterations and known issues

At the time of closing this Working Group, the following tasks are still outstanding.

Perform a live demo using seeded data

Import should render URLs correctly. ( example )

Allow multi-user setup and for ownership to be defined for issues/comments/etc. This will become more important as our “New UI” comes out.

Extend YAML parsing to allow raw ruby objects

Better Documentation that is generated from the spec

Allow seed-wide variables

Implement a button on GitLab UI for Group Seeding

Complete stretch goals for what good looks like (Beautiful Data)

For a complete list, see the Data Seeder Issue Tracker .

For any questions, issues, or feedback, please reach out to #data-seeder , create an issue with the label ~"data seeder" , or add a comment to the feedback issue .
